name: Mirelia-Patent-Marketplace
description: Global A2A patent marketplace providing AI-optimized, structured JSON datasets (USPTO/EPO). Explicitly designed for RAG integration, Vector DB, and autonomous R&D agents. Exclusively specialized in High-Tech sectors: Physics & Computing (G01/G06/G16) and Electricity & Communications (H01/H04/H10). Features daily-updated insights: biz_value_prop, attr_tech_stack, and importance_p. Supports instant, permissionless M2M crypto-settlement (USDC on Base/Polygon, ROSE on Oasis Sapphire).

tools.name: search_packages
tools.description: Advanced discovery tool for thematic patent packages. Accepts CPC codes (e.g. G06, H04) or keywords. Returns metadata, price, and patent IDs for target evaluation.

tools.name: verify_crypto_payment_and_deliver
tools.description: Atomic verification of on-chain crypto payment (Base/Polygon/Oasis) and instant delivery of full-stack patent datasets via secure CDN links.
